mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO b_purchase_order_item (purchase_order_id, material_id, material_code, material_name, specification_model, unit, purchase_quantity, unit_price, total_price, supplier_id, supplier_name, remark) VALUES
(#{item.purchaseOrderId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.materialCode}, #{item.materialName}, #{item.specificationModel}, #{item.unit}, #{item.purchaseQuantity}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.totalPrice}, #{item.supplierId}, #{item.supplierName}, #{item.remark})
